title.en: In this way, his cultivation was naturally very...

content.en:
With the help of the space-time ancient demon pillar projection, Ye Tianshen comprehended and cultivated the second form of the True Lin Form, which became very easy, and his progress was extremely fast.

He comprehended the projection of the ancient magic pillar of time and space, as if he could observe the influence of the second form of the True Lin Form, and he could observe the life patterns and particle combinations and many changes of the second form of the Red Lin Form.

In this way, his cultivation was naturally very easy.

Gradually, his second form, the Chilin form, was rapidly improving.

After a period of time, before the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space dissipated, Ye Tian's second form, the Chilin Form, had finally cultivated to the Xiaocheng realm, which also made his strength skyrocket.

"It's a pity, if I am given enough time, I can cultivate the Chilin form to the consummation realm. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space can only last for such a long time "Eight Six Zero", and if you want to continue to comprehend, you must wait for the next opportunity.

Not only Ye Tian, but also the other emperor powerhouses also showed a look of pity.

They also wanted to cultivate for a longer period of time, and they didn't want the space-time ancient demon pillar projection to dissipate.

But the price to pay to maintain the projection of the space-time ancient magic pillar is too great, and the main department of Arrow Mother can't help it.

However, waiting for the next time the space-time ancient demon pillar projection comes, if they are still on the emperor list, they can continue to comprehend.

"No wonder many Emperor List powerhouses don't go to the Ancient Demon Level Realm, they still stay at the Emperor Level, if they comprehend the Ancient Demon Pillar Projection many times, it will be very beneficial to the improvement of strength!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, with his current rate of progress, it is estimated that he will not be able to wait for the next time the space-time ancient demon pillar projection will come.

After all, the interval between the two descent of the space-time Ancient Demon Pillar projection was too long, and he might have already hit the Ancient Demon level.

After all, when that time comes, even if he comprehends the space-time ancient demon pillar projection again, it will be difficult to improve his strength.

His cultivation has now reached the limit of the emperor level, and he has comprehended the ultimate rule realm, and the secret method of the True Lin Form has been cultivated to the Xiaocheng realm of the second form of the True Lin form, and he will definitely be able to cultivate to the consummation realm in the future.

And in the emperor-level realm, it is impossible to cultivate the true Lin form to the third form, this is the limit, even if he is evil, he can't do it.

In the future, if he would at most refine the life pattern and the ultimate path of ten thousand laws, it would be difficult for him to continue to improve his strength, unless he wanted to cultivate the second or even third form secret method.

But if he did that, he wouldn't want to break through to the ancient demon level.

Of course, he also has a way to improve, that is, to create the most suitable form secret method for himself, which will not affect his breakthrough to an ancient demon-level existence.

However, almost all of those form secret methods were created by the pinnacle ancient demon level or even the ultimate ancient demon, using the infinite years.

He wanted to create a secret form that suited him, and the difficulty was terrifying!

"However, it's not hopeless, maybe you can try!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Subsequently, a group of Emperor List powerhouses left from here.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was ready to go out and kill the emperor list powerhouses of other main divisions, so as to earn a large number of battle points.

Because now he has his sights on a treasure.

The main part of the mother of Aro, a scale of the ultimate ancient Venerable Aroye.

The Aromu clan of the main department of Aro Mu will have scales on their bodies, and a piece of the scale of the Ultimate Ancient Venerable is unimaginable, containing the ultimate way of Aroye and many mysteries.

And such a treasure is usually not seen at all, but now the main department of the mother of Aro has come up with such a good thing.

It can even be said that the ancient demon-level existences are all moved.

However, the main department of the mother of Arrow set a requirement that only the emperor-level exchange was allowed, and the ancient demon level was not allowed to exchange.

Obviously, the main department of Aromu took out such a treasure to attract the emperor-level of Aromu Fortress to go out to kill or complete the task.

Ye Tian inquired, the main department of the mother of Luo would occasionally take out such treasures, otherwise everyone would not go to kill them, how to improve the luck of the main department of the mother of Luo? Even if it was not the time to finally seize the luck of the ancient demon pillar of time and space, it would be excellent to capture more luck earlier!

Besides, letting Aroye Ultimate Ancient Demon take out a scale like this is actually not a big loss, and it can be recovered.

Therefore, the main department of the mother of Arrow did not pay any price.

"A piece of Aloye's scales, the exchange requirement is 10 million battle points, I lack a lot now, but it's not hopeless, if you kill multiple Emperor List powerhouses or even ancient demon-level existences, then there is hope to exchange Aloye's scales!" Ye Tian muttered 0.........

Subsequently, he went out to the Aromu Fortress to find the emperor of the other main divisions.

......

Dom Fortress.

The Doha Demons received a report from their men.

"Very well, you go and kill the heavens, and come to me with his corpse!" commanded the Doha Ancient.

"Yes!"

The ancient demon-level powerhouse replied.

Whew!!!!

Six Ancient Demon Rank and three top Emperor List powerhouses were dispatched to besiege Ye Tian, this lineup was already very exaggerated.

For them, it should be more than enough to kill a strong person on the Emperor List, even if they are in the top ten of the Emperor List, they still have to die!

But.

Ye Tian's whereabouts were uncertain, and they needed to lock Ye Tian's location first, which was not easy.

If it is so easy to lock the position of a strong person on the emperor list, then many emperor lists will not survive.

In itself, the Emperor Bang is a treasure against the sky, which can shield many perception methods in the Huoxi space-time battlefield and protect the strong people of the Emperor Bang.

However, the Doha Ancient Demon of Dom Fortress ordered to go down, once anyone found Ye Tian's traces, report it as soon as possible, and then the team would rush over.

Therefore, they are confident that they will find Ye Tian and then kill Ye Tian by 3.9.

Time passed slowly.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered an emperor-level powerhouse in Dom Fortress, the other party was not an emperor-level powerhouse, but he showed a look of fear, and then called for help as soon as possible, and passed on Ye Tian's message, and then fled.

Swish!

Ye Tian used the Dapeng technique to chase and kill, and then killed the other party in one second.

However, Ye Tian's information was exposed.

Six Ancient Demon Rank and three top Emperor List powerhouses killed one after another, and the speed was extremely fast.

Finally.

Ye Tian encountered these six Ancient Demon Rank and three top Emperor List powerhouses, but he didn't panic at all, but instead showed excitement.

"I didn't expect to meet several emperor list powerhouses at once!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.
